response.overview: A true story about the success of an operation as well as the challenges and difficulties faced by officers of the Road Transport Department (JPJ). The JPJ top management has directed Mr. Shah to establish an elite squad known as the JPJ Squad. The purpose of this squad, which is based in Putrajaya, was established to carry out a specific mission involving road traffic violations and crimes. Mr. Shah, as the Head of Investigation & Operations Section, appointed five members who are skilled in specific fields to form the JPJ Squad. They consist of Faiz, Zamani, Jason, Shila and Jessi.
response.title: Skuad JPJ
